checkpoints.label: Fasted Initialization
checkpoints.sms_suffix: Empty stomach. Hydrate first. Reply 'done' when taken.

checkpoints.label: Post-Workout Shake
checkpoints.sms_suffix: Within 30min of workout. Reply 'done' when taken.

checkpoints.label: The One Meal

conditions.note: All fat-soluble compounds need dietary fat for absorption

checkpoints.sms_suffix: WITH FOOD (need fat for absorption). Reply 'done' when taken.

checkpoints.label: Evening Wind-Down
checkpoints.sms_suffix: With light snack or on its own. Reply 'done' when taken.

tirzepatide.name: Tirzepatide ODT
tirzepatide.notes: ODT format requires empty stomach for sublingual absorption

vyvanse.name: Vyvanse
vyvanse.notes: Primary stimulant. Take early AM; do NOT redose after 10am

bupropion.name: Bupropion XL
bupropion.notes: Dopaminergic baseline. Works synergistically with Vyvanse

iron-bisglycinate.name: Iron Bisglycinate
iron-bisglycinate.notes: Take fasted, AWAY from coffee/Multi. Pair with Vitamin C

vitamin-c.name: Vitamin C
vitamin-c.notes: Enhances iron absorption 2-3x. Also supports NAC/glutathione

alpha-gpc.name: Alpha GPC
alpha-gpc.notes: Acetylcholine precursor. Pre-workout cognitive boost. Do NOT take after 2pm

protein-powder.name: Protein Powder
protein-powder.notes: Critical during GLP-1 use to prevent sarcopenia

creatine.name: Creatine Monohydrate
creatine.notes: Mix into shake. Spares methyl groups (MTHFR support)

methylated-multi.name: O.N.E. Multivitamin
methylated-multi.notes: Contains methylated B12/Folate, CoQ10, ALA. Take with food

b12-folate.name: B12 Folate
b12-folate.notes: Methylcobalamin + Metafolin®. Stacks with Multi for methylation support

omega-3.name: Fish Oil (EPA/DHA)
omega-3.notes: ⚠️ MUST take with food to avoid reflux. Brain structure, inflammation

bacopa.name: Bacopa Monnieri
bacopa.notes: Fat-soluble. Take with meal. BDNF support

curcumin.name: Curcuma Pura (Curcumin)
curcumin.notes: Fat-soluble — MUST take with fat-containing meal. Anti-inflammatory

probiotic.name: Probiotic 10
probiotic.notes: Supports gut health and Tirzepatide GI tolerance

psyllium.name: Psyllium Husk
psyllium.notes: Essential for GI motility on Tirzepatide. MUST take with 12oz+ water

ashwagandha.name: Ashwagandha
ashwagandha.notes: Adaptogen. Evening optimal for cortisol management. Warrior genotype support

magnesium.name: Magnesium Glycinate
magnesium.notes: COMT cofactor. Critical for clearing dopamine and enabling sleep

psyllium-optional.name: Psyllium Husk (optional 2nd dose)
psyllium-optional.notes: Overnight satiety and morning regularity. Take with 12oz+ water

iron-bisglycinate.notes: Iron absorption reduced 40-70% by blockers; VitC enhances 2-3x. Take 2hr before multi

alpha-gpc.notes: Acetylcholine boost can interfere with sleep architecture

vyvanse.notes: Extended-release stimulant needs full runway to clear before sleep

caffeine.notes: CLOCK + CYP1A2 genetics mean late caffeine degrades deep sleep

hard_rules: Fat-soluble compounds (Curcumin, Bacopa, Fish Oil): MUST take with The One Meal
Fish Oil: ALWAYS with food (empty stomach = reflux)
Psyllium Husk: MUST take with 12oz+ water
